ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Casey for Colin King (Administrator).

Mr. Casey reported that they received an acceptable offer and that escrow is expected to close by the end of next week or the following week. Status of close of the Estate was continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Confirmation That The Property Is On The Market
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Casey for and with Colin King (Administrator).

Mr. Casey stated that they expect to have the property listed within 30-days. Status of confirmation that the property is on the market was set for September 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of close of the Estate was set for November 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
